# Forbidden Draft Fields

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/draftfields -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to adapter-draft-fields.md](../adapter-draft-fields.md)

Executable SSOT: [`draft-field-surface.riido.json`](draft-field-surface.riido.json).

Evidence artifact: `draft-fields-evidence`.

## Authority Boundary

Adapter observes. Adapter ACL creates a normalized draft. Only EventIngestor appends.

## Fields

| Field | Filled by | Why not adapter |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `EventID` | EventIngestor | central event id issue keeps append ordering deterministic |
| `sequence / ordering metadata` | EventIngestor | events for one task must be ordered by ingest authority |
| `RuntimeID` | EventIngestor lease lookup | lease owns the runtime identity paired to the assignment |
| `CapabilityFingerprint` | EventIngestor lease lookup | capability identity must match the paired lease fingerprint |
| `ActorKind` | authorized caller / EventIngestor config | adapter-owned attribution breaks audit invariants |
| `ActorID` | server transition layer | actor attribution belongs to authorized orchestration |
| `EventSchemaVersion` | EventIngestor | active reducer version is not adapter-local |
| `FSMVersion` | server transition layer | only transition events get the active FSM schema |
| `OccurredAt` | EventIngestor | ingest owns external event timestamp policy |
| `IngestedAt` | EventIngestor | append time is decided by ingest authority |

## Assertions

- `adapter draft surface is observation-only`
- `implemented allowed fields must have source evidence`
- `reserved allowed fields must be named but not falsely claimed as emitted`
- `forbidden authority fields must not appear in draft construction scope`
- `EventIngestor remains the only append authority`
